title: Design meets compassion in Knysna homes event
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Beautiful Homes of Knysna...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Beautiful Homes of Knysna event sponsored by Seeff will take place on Sunday 7 September. All proceeds go directly to Knysna Sedgefield Hospice, supporting vital palliative care for local families.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Beautiful Homes of Knysna event sponsored by Seeff will take place on Sunday 7 September. All proceeds go directly to Knysna Sedgefield Hospice, supporting vital palliative care for local families."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event's unique open homes tour invites the public to explore eight private residences across Knysna, each showcasing exceptional design, breathtaking views and lush gardens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From modern architectural gems to timeless interiors, every home offers a window into the creativity and elegance that define this special town. Whether you're a lover of design, architecture, or simply looking for an inspiring and meaningful Sunday outing, this event delivers beauty with purpose.","html":"From modern architectural gems to timeless interiors, every home offers a window into the creativity and elegance that define this special town. Whether you're a lover of design, architecture, or simply looking for an inspiring and meaningful Sunday outing, this event delivers beauty with purpose."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event starts at 10:00 and runs until 16:00.","html":"The event starts at 10:00 and runs until 16:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets are limited and can be secured at Knysna Sedgefield Hospice (24 Wilson Street) or Seeff, Thesen Island.","html":"Tickets are limited and can be secured at Knysna Sedgefield Hospice (24 Wilson Street) or Seeff, Thesen Island."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Design meets compassion in Knysna homes event
